name: CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupXfm

text.value: WITH BaseSQL AS ( SELECT TMP.CLM_ID, TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, TMP.SRC_SYS_CD, TMP.CLNT_ID, TMP.BTCH_ID, TMP.ROW_CRT_DT, TMP.SVC_YR_MO, TMP.PD_YR_MO, TMP.ST, TMP.METRO_STAT_AREA, TMP.EXCL_CD, TMP.PRTL_YR_GRP, TMP.MCARE_COV, TMP.HCG_IN, TMP.MBR_AGE_BAND, TMP.CNTR_AGE_BAND, TMP.HCG_AGE_BAND, TMP.DMGRPHC_GRP, TMP.STD_INDST_CD, TMP.PCP_ID, TMP.MNGD_POP, TMP.DRG, TMP.CMS_ERR_CD, TMP.CASE_ADM_ID, TMP.MR_LN, TMP.MR_LN_DTL, TMP.MR_LN_CASE, TMP.PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN, TMP.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN, TMP.MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL, TMP.SPEC_TYP, TMP.FCLTY_CASE_ID, TMP.MR_CASES_ADM, TMP.MR_UNIT_DAYS, TMP.MR_PROC, TMP.MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, TMP.MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY, TMP.MR_PROC_PATN_PAY, TMP.MR_BILL_AMT, TMP.MR_ALW_AMT, TMP.MR_PD_AMT, TMP.MR_COPAY_AMT, TMP.MR_COINS_AMT, TMP.MR_DEDCT_AMT, TMP.MR_PATN_PAY_AMT, TMP.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM, TMP.PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, CASE WHEN (CLM.CLM_LN_SK IS NULL OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(TMP.SRC_SYS_CD)))=0 OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(TMP.CLM_ID)))=0 OR LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO)))=0) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ERRIND, MPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK FROM @{pipeline().parameters.TempOwner}.BLUEKC_HCG_TEMP AS TMP LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.K_CLM_LN AS CLM ON TMP.CLM_ID = CLM.CLM_ID AND (CASE WHEN (RTRIM(LTRIM(TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO)) = '' OR TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(TMP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO)) AS SMALLINT) END) = CLM.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS MPNG ON MPNG.SRC_CD = TMP.SRC_SYS_CD AND MPNG.SRC_DOMAIN_NM = 'SOURCE SYSTEM' AND MPNG.TRGT_DOMAIN_NM = 'SOURCE SYSTEM' AND MPNG.SRC_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' AND MPNG.TRGT_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' ) DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.err_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupXfm SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLNT_ID, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, BTCH_ID, ROW_CRT_DT, SVC_YR_MO, PD_YR_MO, ST, METRO_STAT_AREA, EXCL_CD, PRTL_YR_GRP, MCARE_COV, HCG_IN, MBR_AGE_BAND, CNTR_AGE_BAND, HCG_AGE_BAND, DMGRPHC_GRP, STD_INDST_CD, PCP_ID, MNGD_POP, DRG, CMS_ERR_CD, CASE_ADM_ID, MR_LN, MR_LN_DTL, MR_LN_CASE, PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN, MCARE_ADVNTG_LN, MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL, SPEC_TYP, FCLTY_CASE_ID, MR_CASES_ADM, MR_UNIT_DAYS, MR_PROC, MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY, MR_PROC_PATN_PAY, MR_BILL_AMT, MR_ALW_AMT, MR_PD_AMT, MR_COPAY_AMT, MR_COINS_AMT, MR_DEDCT_AMT, MR_PATN_PAY_AMT, PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM, PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.err_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupXfm FROM BaseSQL WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(ERRIND))='Y' DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.nonerr_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupXfm SELECT RTRIM(LTRIM(CLM_ID)) AS CLM_ID, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(CLM_LN_SEQ_NO)) AS INT) AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, RTRIM(LTRIM(SRC_SYS_CD)) AS SRC_SYS_CD, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(BTCH_ID)) AS INT) AS BTCH_ID, RTRIM(LTRIM(ROW_CRT_DT)) AS ROW_CRT_DT, RTRIM(LTRIM(SVC_YR_MO)) AS SVC_YR_MO, RTRIM(LTRIM(PD_YR_MO)) AS PD_YR_MO, RTRIM(LTRIM(ST)) AS ST, RTRIM(LTRIM(METRO_STAT_AREA)) AS METRO_STAT_AREA, RTRIM(LTRIM(EXCL_CD)) AS EXCL_CD, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(PRTL_YR_GRP)) AS INT) AS PRTL_YR_GRP, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MCARE_COV)) AS INT) AS MCARE_COV, RTRIM(LTRIM(HCG_IN)) AS HCG_IN, RTRIM(LTRIM(MBR_AGE_BAND)) AS MBR_AGE_BAND, RTRIM(LTRIM(CNTR_AGE_BAND)) AS CNTR_AGE_BAND, RTRIM(LTRIM(HCG_AGE_BAND)) AS HCG_AGE_BAND, RTRIM(LTRIM(DMGRPHC_GRP)) AS DMGRPHC_GRP, RTRIM(LTRIM(STD_INDST_CD)) AS STD_INDST_CD, RTRIM(LTRIM(PCP_ID)) AS PCP_ID, RTRIM(LTRIM(MNGD_POP)) AS MNGD_POP, RTRIM(LTRIM(DRG)) AS DRG, RTRIM(LTRIM(CMS_ERR_CD)) AS CMS_ERR_CD, RTRIM(LTRIM(CASE_ADM_ID)) AS CASE_ADM_ID, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_LN)))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_LN)) END AS MR_LN, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_LN_DTL)))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_LN_DTL)) END AS MR_LN_DTL, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_LN_CASE)))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_LN_CASE)) END AS MR_LN_CASE, RTRIM(LTRIM(PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN)) AS PLN_BNF_PCKG_LN, RTRIM(LTRIM(MCARE_ADVNTG_LN)) AS MCARE_ADVNTG_LN, RTRIM(LTRIM(MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL)) AS MCARE_ADVNTG_LN_DTL, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(SPEC_TYP)))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE RTRIM(LTRIM(SPEC_TYP)) END AS SPEC_TYP, RTRIM(LTRIM(FCLTY_CASE_ID)) AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, MR_CASES_ADM AS MR_CASES_ADM, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_UNIT_DAYS)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_UNIT_DAYS)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) END AS MR_UNIT_DAYS, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_PROC)) AS INT) AS MR_PROC, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY)) AS INT) END AS MR_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) END AS MR_UNIT_DAYS_PATN_PAY, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_PROC_PATN_PAY)) AS INT) AS MR_PROC_PATN_PAY, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_BILL_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_BILL_AMT, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_ALW_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_ALW_AMT, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_PD_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_PD_AMT, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_COPAY_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_COPAY_AMT, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_COINS_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_COINS_AMT, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_DEDCT_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_DEDCT_AMT, CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(MR_PATN_PAY_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MR_PATN_PAY_AMT, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM)) AS INT) END AS PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY)))=0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(RTRIM(LTRIM(PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY)) AS INT) END AS PLN_BNF_PCKG_CASES_ADM_PATN_PAY, CD_MPPNG_SK AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.nonerr_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLkupXfm FROM BaseSQL WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(ERRIND))='N'
